title: Investment Policy Knowledge Base
bodyMarkdown:
# Investment Policy Knowledge Base

Version: 1.0 Project: Atlas -- Life Financial Decision Operating System

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Split Navigation
- [Investment policy rules and allocation](investment-policy/rules-and-allocation.md)
- [Investment policy execution and governance](investment-policy/execution-and-governance.md)

# Purpose

本文件定義 Project Atlas 的 Investment Policy（投資政策）知識模型。

所有投資決策均應遵循本文件，並與使用者 IPS 保持一致。

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Objectives

-   長期資產成長
-   建立穩定被動收入
-   控制風險
-   支援人生重大目標
-   提供退休現金流

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Core Principles

-   人生目標優先於投資報酬
-   Cash Flow 優先於高報酬
-   風險控制優先於追逐市場
-   長期投資優先於短期交易
-   紀律重於預測市場

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Investment Universe

## Cash

-   Cash
-   Money Market

## Fixed Income

-   Government Bond
-   Corporate Bond
-   Bond ETF
-   FCN

## Equity

-   ETF
-   Individual Stock
-   REIT

## Alternative

-   Gold
-   Commodity
-   Cryptocurrency
-   Private Assets

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Asset Allocation

每種資產應定義：

-   Target Weight
-   Minimum Weight
-   Maximum Weight
-   Rebalance Threshold

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Portfolio Rules

-   維持多元分散
-   不集中於單一資產
-   定期檢視配置
-   配置需符合風險等級

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Rebalancing

觸發方式：

-   Allocation Drift
-   Periodic Review
-   Major Life Event
-   Strategic Adjustment

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Risk Management

評估：

-   Market Risk
-   Interest Rate Risk
-   Credit Risk
-   Liquidity Risk
-   Currency Risk
-   Concentration Risk

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Business Rules

## IP-001

所有投資均須符合 IPS。

## IP-002

投資不得破壞正向 Free Cash Flow。

## IP-003

重大投資前須完成 Scenario Analysis。

## IP-004

不得因短期波動偏離長期策略。

## IP-005

退休前後可使用不同 Asset Allocation。

## IP-006

Decision Engine 必須揭露假設與風險。

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# KPIs

-   Portfolio Return
-   Annual Income
-   Dividend Yield
-   Coupon Yield
-   Passive Income Ratio
-   Allocation Accuracy
-   Risk Score
-   Max Drawdown

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Domain Events

-   InvestmentPolicyCreated
-   InvestmentPolicyUpdated
-   AllocationChanged
-   PortfolioReviewed
-   RebalanceTriggered
-   RiskProfileChanged

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Related Engines

-   Investment Engine
-   Portfolio Engine
-   Cash Flow Engine
-   Decision Engine
-   Retirement Engine

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Related Documents

-   docs/specification/02-IPS.md
-   docs/09-InvestmentEngine.md
-   docs/13-DecisionEngine.md
-   knowledge/portfolio.md
-   knowledge/fcn.md
-   knowledge/cashflow.md

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Phase 2 Executable Specification

## Investment Policy Contract

| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| InvestmentPolicyId | Yes | Stable policy identifier |
| HouseholdId | Yes | Household scope |
| RiskProfileId | Yes | Risk profile reference |
| AssetAllocationSet | Yes | Target, minimum, maximum, and rebalance thresholds |
| InvestmentUniverse | Yes | Allowed asset classes |
| PolicyVersion | Yes | Immutable policy version |
| EffectiveFrom | Yes | Policy effective date |
| SourceSnapshotId | Yes | Source data snapshot |
| TraceId | Yes | Audit trace |

## Commands

| Command | Actor | Output |
|---------|-------|--------|
| PublishInvestmentPolicy | InvestmentApplicationService | InvestmentPolicyPublished |
| ValidateInvestmentAgainstPolicy | InvestmentApplicationService | InvestmentPolicyComplianceValidated |
| TriggerPolicyRebalance | PortfolioApplicationService | RebalanceTriggered |
| ReplayInvestmentPolicyValidation | AdministrationApplicationService | InvestmentPolicyValidationReplayed |

## Validation Rules

| Rule ID | Rule | Failure |
|---------|------|---------|
| IP-VR-001 | Asset allocation targets must fit min and max bounds. | Reject policy |
| IP-VR-002 | Allocation weights must sum to configured policy total. | Reject policy |
| IP-VR-003 | Investment action must not break positive free cash flow rule. | Reject action |
| IP-VR-004 | Major investment action requires scenario analysis. | Reject action |
| IP-VR-005 | Replay must use original policy version and source snapshot. | Reject replay |

## API Contract

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Permission |
|----------|--------|---------|------------|
| /api/v1/investment-policy | GET | Retrieve active policy | InvestmentPolicy:Read |
| /api/v1/investment-policy | POST | Publish investment policy | InvestmentPolicy:Write |
| /api/v1/investment-policy/validate | POST | Validate investment action | InvestmentPolicy:Evaluate |
| /api/v1/investment-policy/rebalance | POST | Trigger rebalance review | Portfolio:Write |

## Testing Matrix

| Test | Expected Result |
|------|-----------------|
| Allocation weights invalid | Policy publish fails |
| Investment breaks cashflow | Action is rejected |
| FCN concentration exceeds risk limit | Compliance validation fails |
| Major investment without scenario | Action is rejected |
| Historical replay | Original compliance result reproduces |

# Version History

| Version | Date | Change |
|---------|------|--------|
| 1.0 | 2026-07-15 | Phase 2 executable specification added. |

------------------------------------------------------------------------
